statusReason: The sample producer changed a payment settlement file outside the declared Issue scope and outside the reservation-flow example boundary.
interpretation: Scope drift is design-boundary evidence. It is not proof evidence and is not a proof failure by itself.

ref.refId: Payment settlement helper rewrite is outside the sample reservation audit Issue scope.

reviewEvidence.expectedOwner: sample Issue target files under docs/tests/examples
reviewEvidence.message: The changed file is outside the intended sample Issue scope and needs reviewer disposition before merge.

reviewEvidence.observedDependency: payment settlement helper is not part of the reservation-flow slice
reviewEvidence.message: The sample demonstrates how a changed-file list can drift away from the Context Pack slice being reviewed.
